calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332. Telephone #415 250 2926.

Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, TCF NATIONAL BANK.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MICHAEL D. RUYBAL.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $32,359.82
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,212.70
Attorney's Fees: $2,189.50
Costs: $809.30
Total Judgment in the amount of $40,571.32
Judgment signed in open court.
